videos.title: 20 Hare Apparents Meditate in the Moonlight  Against the Odds
videos.description:
How many bunnies can a deck with 20 Hare Apparents and Moonlight Meditation make in Standard? Let's find out!

Today's video is brought to you by Card Kingdom. You can pick up some Magic: the Gathering cards (and help support the show) at https://www.cardkingdom.com/mtggoldfish

► Read more about this deck (full article): https://www.mtggoldfish.com/articles/against-the-odds-20-hare-apparents-meditate-standard
► View this deck with the latest prices: https://www.mtggoldfish.com/deck/7277772#paper

◼ Purchase this deck (paper): http://mtg.fish/qDVNv
◼ Purchase this deck (Magic Online): http://mtg.fish/xK9bN
